summary: Targeted re-test of the 'Book an Appointment -> black screen' fix. Booking flow now works end-to-end with native <select>, no console errors, body scroll lock/unlock works, ErrorBoundary wraps routes in App.js. Primary bug fix verified.
passed: Home loads, nav-book-btn visible after loader
Clicking nav-book-btn opens booking-dialog (NO black screen, nav still in DOM behind overlay)
document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden' while modal open; reset to '' after close
Native <select data-testid=booking-service> renders all 6 services and is changeable (selected 'Bridal')
POST /api/bookings success -> booking-success card + 'Booking confirmed' toast
booking-close-confirmed closes dialog, dialog removed from DOM
window.scrollY changes (557) after scroll => scroll fully restored post-close
ErrorBoundary component present at /app/frontend/src/components/site/ErrorBoundary.jsx with data-testid='error-boundary' and 'error-boundary-reload', imported and wrapping <BrowserRouter> in App.js
ZERO console / pageerror events during full booking journey
notes: Minor observation (not a bug): success card text appears CSS-uppercased so a substring check for 'Jane' returned false, but the booking-success element rendered and 'Booking confirmed' toast appeared - submission verified. contact-book-btn was not explicitly clicked but uses the same component path as nav/hero buttons which both work.
